title: Monolith of Glass
content: You spend the afternoon watching the Atlas Foundation building from a coffee shop across the street. The security is tighter than a prison—biometric scanners at every entrance and private guards with a military bearing.||You notice a recurring visitor: a black sedan with government plates. Someone powerful is protecting this place.||Without a way to bypass the digital security or a high-level keycard, getting inside will be a suicide mission. You need a better angle.||📝 WALL BOARD UPDATED: Atlas security protocols noted.
